scripts.macos:debug: tauri build -t x86_64-apple-darwin -d && node scripts/copy_artifacts.js x86_64-apple-darwin debug
scripts.macos:build: tauri build -t x86_64-apple-darwin && node scripts/copy_artifacts.js x86_64-apple-darwin release
scripts.windows:debug: tauri build -t x86_64-pc-windows-gnu -d && node scripts/copy_artifacts.js x86_64-pc-windows-gnu debug
scripts.windows:build: tauri build -t x86_64-pc-windows-gnu && node scripts/copy_artifacts.js x86_64-pc-windows-gnu release
scripts.android:open: vite build -- --after-build='cap sync android && cap open android'
scripts.android:debug: vite build -- --after-build='cap sync android && cap run android' && node scripts/copy_artifacts.js android debug
scripts.android:build: vite build -- --after-build='cap sync android && cap build android' && node scripts/copy_artifacts.js android release
